# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Shell command to run for the build process'
        required: false
        default: 'npm run build'
      pre_build_command:
        description: 'Shell command to run before the build process'
        required: false
        default: ''
      post_build_command:
        description: 'Shell command to run after the build process'
        required: false
        default: ''

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run pre-build command
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.pre_build_command != '' }}
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.pre_build_command }}

      - name: Run build command
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}

      - name: Run post-build command
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.post_build_command != '' }}
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.post_build_command }}
